_note: Confirmed against the live Skool members directory on 2026-06-14. Card matching keys off the styled-component name prefix (the -sc-xxxx hash suffix changes on Skool rebuilds, the prefix is stable). Fields are parsed from each card's visible text in read-roster.mjs, which survives class-hash churn better than per-field selectors. Run `npm run probe` if a read breaks.
_intent_note: Intake answers (Q1, Q3) only appear in the per-member profile drawer that opens when a card is clicked. These selectors are best-guess placeholders; run `node read-roster.mjs --probe-intent` against a real card to confirm.
